message:
Harden bead dependency graph: 22 new edges, 6 new test beads

Second-pass review using bv diagnostics found:
- 48 prematurely actionable items (should be ~5)
- Missing intra-epic dependencies (SVG, parser, layout subtasks)
- Missing cross-epic dependencies (extraction -> foundation, testing -> compile gate)

Fixes applied:
- SVG renderer chain: shapes->core, edges->shapes, clusters->edges, theming->all, a11y->theming
- Parser subtasks all depend on extraction compile gate (bd-3bc.5)
- Layout subtasks depend on layout extraction (bd-3bc.3)
- Specialized renderers (sequence/class/state/pie/gantt) depend on SVG primitives
- CLI depends on compile gate, interactive mode depends on basic CLI
- All testing infra (golden/proptest/fuzz/bench/compat) depends on compile gate
- Visual polish (shadows/typography/icons/animations/responsive) depends on SVG epic
- WASM pipeline and renderers depend on workspace init and core IR
- Foundation chain: workspace init -> core extraction -> everything else

Added 6 new testing beads (bd-2xl.6-11):
- Per-crate unit tests: fm-core (50+), fm-parser (200+), fm-layout (100+), fm-render-svg (80+)
- E2E test script with 100+ cases and detailed tracing/logging
- Cross-crate integration tests (30+) with tracing instrumentation

Final state: 77 beads, 110 edges, 5 actionable, 72 blocked, 0 cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
